name: Podmore
tagline: Sophisticated British gastropub by the Senia team — emerald booths, $30 cocktails, and everything made from scratch.
mustOrder: fish and chips — elevated but still recognizable
parking: Street parking on Merchant St; downtown parking garages
talkStory: By the same team behind Senia (Chef Anthony Rush and Katherine Nomura). Styled like an elegant London lounge — emerald green booths, brass accents. British-inspired food (fish and chips, bangers and mash, pot pie) all made in-house with local ingredients. The cocktails (~$30) are serious. Small and intimate. A unique concept for Honolulu — nobody else is doing this. Dinner only, Tue–Sat.
